CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-04-2009 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (212)

Hearing On The Petitions The Approve The Compromises Of Two Minors.
Off Calendar Sep-29-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Lawrence Murray, Esq. for and with Petitioner: Carlos Arnoldo Lopez, as Guardian ad litem for and with the Minor Marco Lopez, a minor Claimant and for Minor Claimant Carlos Andres Lopez his appearance was waived by the court at the previous hearing.
Petitioner was sworn and direct examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
As to Minor Marco Lopez : Attorney's Fees $5,079.53, Medical Expenses $2,780.00.
A net balance of $10,870.47.00 to be deposited into a blocked account with bank of America, Union St. - Cow Hollow Branch, San Francisco, CA., no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
As to Minor Carlos Arnoldo Lopez: Attorney's Fees $523.52, Medical Expenses $450.00.
A net balance of $826.48 to be deposited into a blocked account with bank of America, Union St. - Cow Hollow Branch, San Francisco, CA., no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Orders Approving Compromise of Claim and Orders to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.

Plaintiffs Order To Show Cause Re Liens
Off Calendar May-04-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiffs' Order to Show Cause regarding Liens (per ex parte Order of April 10, 2009). Appearances: Noah Kanter, Esq. of Murray and Associates, (415) 673-0555, appearing for Plaintiffs and moving party. There are no other appearances. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Application granted pursuant to stipulation. San Francisco General Hospital Medical Group and Provider Recovery Network lien is stricken. Lien of CCSF against Carlos Andres Lopez is reduced to $450. Lien of CCSF against Marcos Daniel Lopez is reduced to $550. Order signed in open Court.(302/CWW/PB)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759

Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of A Minor.
Off Calendar Sep-11-2008 Continued To Nov-04-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of Two Minors.
Dept. 218, Comm. Frank Drago, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Larry D. Murray, Esq. appeared with petitioner Carlos Arnoldo Lopez, who was present as Guardian ad litem for the minors Carlos Andres Lopez and Marco Daniel Lopez, who were not present at today's hearing.

The Court requires additional information in order to proceed with this morning's hearing. In particular, medical reports from the minors' treating physician are required by the Court. Good cause appearing, this matter is continued to November 4, 2008 @ 9:00 a.m. in Department 218. In addition to the Guardian Ad Litem, the Court Orders the two minors to be present at the next calling of the case.
